prompt_text:
### Demographics: 41-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 4 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Nausea and reduced appetite over the last 1-2 months after starting injections.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Major Depressive Disorder
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Liraglutide 1.8mg once daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Insulin Glargine 20units once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 95.9 kg; Height 177.9 cm; BMI 30.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 129/79 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 11.2%; 9 months ago 11.0%; 6 months ago 11.0%; 3 months ago 11.0%; current 10.5%), FPG (12 months ago 254mg/dL; 9 months ago 320mg/dL; 6 months ago 300mg/dL; 3 months ago 320mg/dL; current 299mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 94.9kg; 9 months ago 94.1kg; 6 months ago 93.2kg; 3 months ago 92.2kg; current 95.9kg), Height (12 months ago 177.9cm; 9 months ago 177.9cm; 6 months ago 177.9cm; 3 months ago 177.9cm; current 177.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 29.0kg/m²; current 30.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 134mmHg; 9 months ago 129mmHg; 6 months ago 135mmHg; 3 months ago 131mmHg; current 129mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 83mmHg; 9 months ago 79mmHg; 6 months ago 80mmHg; 3 months ago 80mmHg; current 79mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 107U/L; 9 months ago 107U/L; 6 months ago 106U/L; 3 months ago 103U/L; current 107U/L), AST (12 months ago 59U/L; 9 months ago 62U/L; 6 months ago 53U/L; 3 months ago 59U/L; current 59U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 53mL/min/1.73m²; current 54mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 76mg/g; 9 months ago 72mg/g; 6 months ago 78mg/g; 3 months ago 84mg/g; current 103mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 75mg/dL; 9 months ago 73mg/dL; 6 months ago 71mg/dL; 3 months ago 76mg/dL; current 74mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 58mg/dL; 9 months ago 55mg/dL; 6 months ago 54mg/dL; 3 months ago 54mg/dL; current 56mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 126mg/dL; 9 months ago 107mg/dL; 6 months ago 124mg/dL; 3 months ago 126mg/dL; current 117mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.7g/dL; 9 months ago 12.8g/dL; 6 months ago 12.6g/dL; 3 months ago 13.4g/dL; current 13.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
